name: Add and Manage Maropost Commerce Cloud POS Registers

Steps to log in to a register can be found in "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/log-in-and-navigate-pos", "children": [{"text": "this article"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Remove a Device from a Register"}], "data-id": "remove-a-device-from-a-register"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When you log into a register from your browser or iPad, the register will be linked to that device. No other devices can access that register unless you remove the link. To remove a device from a register:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In your Maropost Commerce control panel click on "}, {"text": "Point of Sale", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Manage Cash Registers", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You'll see a list of registers that have been created. Click on a register to edit its details."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Registers that aren't linked to a device can be registered by logging into them through an iPad or web browser. Any register linked to a device can't be logged into from a new device."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Before you remove the link to a register you should sync any orders still on it. Any orders not synced will be permanently lost."}]}], "appearance": "warning"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Remove", "bold": true}, {"text": " to remove the link between a register and a device (iPad or computer)."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AddandManageMaropostCommerceCloudPOSRegisters3.05T5g00000szVjAEAU.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AddandManageMaropostCommerceCloudPOSRegisters3.05T5g00000szVjAEAU.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image3", "width": 700, "height": 248}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you no longer need a register, you can make it inactive. Registers can't be deleted as their order history needs to be retained."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Change the "}, {"text": "Status", "bold": true}, {"text": " drop down box to "}, {"text": "Inactive", "bold": true}, {"text": " when you no longer require a register. If you ever need to reactivate it, change this option back to "}, {"text": "Active", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AddandManageMaropostCommerceCloudPOSRegisters4.05T5g00000szVjyEAE.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AddandManageMaropostCommerceCloudPOSRegisters4.05T5g00000szVjyEAE.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image4", "width": 700, "height": 247}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}]
